LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF HOWARD HABERMAN'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-558996 WITH CASE CGC-15-546904 IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO THE PARTIES' STIPULATION. CASES CGC-15-546904 AND CGC-17-558996 ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. THE COURT DESIGNATES CGC-15-546904 AS THE LEAD CASE AND ALL FUTURE FILINGS SHOULD BE MADE IN THE LEAD CASE. THE 4/2/18 TRIAL DATE IS VACATED. THE COURT WILL SET A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ("CMC") AND THE COURT WILL SEND NOTICE OF THE CMC HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A REVISED PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM; MTORREANO@SFTC.ORG. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-558996 WITH CASE CGC-15-546904
Off Calendar Feb-02-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF HOWARD HABERMAN'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-558996 WITH CASE CGC-15-546904 as follows:

Plaintiff Haberman's motion to consolidate is GRANTED pursuant to the parties' stipulation. Cases CGC-15-546904 and CGC-17-558996 are consolidated for all purposes. The court designates CGC-15-546904 as the lead case and all future filings should be made in the lead case. The 4/2/18 trial date is vacated. The court will set a case management conference ("CMC") and the court will send notice of the CMC hearing date.

Plaintiff's counsel to prepare and submit a revised proposed order. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.
